title: identity: assert_ne key-separation check should be debug_assert_ne
description: Identity::generate() in core/src/identity.rs (lines 37-41) uses assert_ne! to verify that the Ed25519 seed and the HPKE seed differ. The two seeds are independently generated from OS randomness; the event of them being equal has probability 2^-256. assert_ne! in production code will abort the process (or unwind, depending on panic mode) for an event that literally cannot happen in practice. The correct idiom is debug_assert_ne! (fires only in debug builds, compiled out in release). Using assert_ne! here causes unnecessary abort risk and confuses the unwrap/assert policy documented in DESIGN.md section 11.
